judge_reason: Description A states there are three mummified figures while Description B states there is only one figure, which is a direct contradiction on object count.
original_image_tags: black-and-white photograph of three small, mummified humanoid figures with elongated heads and bodies wrapped in white cloth, displayed on a white surface.
gpt_mini_desc: *Image: A black-and-white photograph of a small mummified humanoid-like figure lying on white fabric, with a visible head and torso; the page also includes the caption “Figure 1: Mexican journalist Jaime Maussan presented the alleged remains of non-human beings to Congress. (Photo credit: Reuters)”.*
